summary: Successfully tested SPI Weekly enhancements: quintile series (q1-q5), movement counts (increase/decrease/stable), full date tooltip, and series toggle functionality. All backend APIs return live data. No CPI regression detected.
passed_tests: GET /api/spi-weekly returns 200 status
SPI Weekly API returns q1, q2, q3, q4, q5 quintile values in latest
SPI Weekly API returns increase count (17 items)
SPI Weekly API returns decrease count (14 items)
SPI Weekly API returns stable count (20 items)
SPI Weekly API returns week_ending_formatted field (Dec 18, 2025)
SPI Weekly API returns available_series array with ['value', 'q1', 'q2', 'q3', 'q4', 'q5']
SPI Weekly API returns series_labels mapping
SPI Weekly history contains 324 data points with quintile values
SPI Weekly history entries all have week_ending_formatted field
Movement counts sum equals items_tracked (17+14+20 = 51 items)
GET /api/spi-monthly returns 200 status (no regression)
GET /api/cpi-yoy returns 200 with 656 data points (no regression)
GET /api/cpi-mom returns 200 with 711 data points (no regression)
GET /api/cpi-yoy-historical returns 200 (no regression)
GET /api/cpi-mom-historical returns 200 (no regression)
Inflation Panel displays SPI Weekly card with movement count chips (↑17, ↓14, =20)
SPI Weekly modal shows series toggle group with Combined, Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, Q5 buttons
Series toggle buttons can be selected/deselected
Chart updates correctly when toggling series
Modal summary shows full date with day (Dec 18, 2025)
Chart tooltip shows full date format (December 28, 2023)
SPI Monthly modal correctly does NOT show quintile toggles
CPI YoY modal opens and displays correctly
CPI MoM modal opens and displays correctly
seed_data_creation: None needed - SPI data fetched live from Google Sheet
context_for_next_testing_agent: SPI Weekly enhancements fully tested. Backend fetches quintile data (q1-q5) from Google Sheet 'main raw data' tab. Movement counts (increase/decrease/stable) show items with price changes. Frontend SPIModal.js displays toggle buttons for Combined + Q1-Q5 series. Series can be selected/deselected and chart updates. Tooltip shows full date with day (e.g., 'December 28, 2023'). SPI Monthly does NOT show quintile toggles since it only has Q1 data. No CPI regression - all endpoints working.
